title: verbascum nigrum var. collinum
intro: Verbascum nigrum var. collinum, also known as Collin's Mullein, is a variety of the Mullein plant, a biennial or perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves, flowers, and roots, which contain mucilages, saponins, and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Collin's Mullein include its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, reduce inflammation and pain, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infections. Collin's Mullein can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in topical applications to treat skin conditions and wounds.
